modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty sharing documents from Google Drive.

full_description_text:  
The user is trying to share documents stored in Google Drive. They are unsure of the steps required to complete the sharing process. This issue may involve permissions or sharing settings that are not clear to them. The user seeks guidance on how to proceed with sharing their files effectively.
short_description: Difficulty sharing documents from Google Drive.
description: The user is trying to share documents stored in Google Drive. They are unsure of the steps required to complete the sharing process. This issue may involve permissions or sharing settings that are not clear to them. The user seeks guidance on how to proceed with sharing their files effectively.
